test_desc: Smoke - Printer status component visible on POS screen
test_step: Navigate to /pos; Wait for POS to load
expected_result: Printer status indicator visible in top bar (shows 'disconnected' since no printer attached); Clicking it opens settings popover

test_desc: Smoke - Printer settings popover has controls
test_step: On POS screen; Click printer status icon
expected_result: Popover shows: Paper Width selector (58mm/80mm), Connection selector (USB/Serial), Connect button; No errors

test_desc: Smoke - TransactionView has Reprint and PDF buttons
expected_result: 'Reprint Receipt' button visible; 'Download PDF' button visible

test_desc: Full - Reprint API returns full transaction data
test_step: Create transaction via API; Call POST /transaction/:id/reprint
expected_result: Returns transaction with reprinted=true, items array, payments array, location data, cashier data

test_desc: Full - Reprint creates audit log entry
test_step: Create transaction; Call reprint API; Check audit logs
expected_result: Audit log entry created with action='reprint', module='pos', entityType='pos_transaction'

test_desc: Full - Reprint button on TransactionView triggers action
test_step: Navigate to transaction detail; Click 'Reprint Receipt' button
expected_result: Reprint logged toast appears (no printer connected so PDF fallback); No errors

test_desc: Full - Download PDF button on TransactionView
test_step: Navigate to transaction detail; Click 'Download PDF' button
expected_result: PDF downloads without error; No error toast

test_desc: Full - Checkout success shows Print and PDF buttons
test_step: Complete a checkout on POS screen; View success dialog
expected_result: Success dialog shows 'Print' button and 'PDF' button side by side; Both clickable

test_desc: Full - PDF download from checkout success
test_step: Complete checkout; Click PDF button on success screen
expected_result: Receipt PDF downloads; No error toast

test_desc: Edge Case - Reprint non-existent transaction returns 404
Edge Case - Multiple reprints create multiple audit entries
test_step: Reprint same transaction twice via API
expected_result: Two audit log entries created for same transaction
isChrome() returns boolean based on user agent

test_desc: Edge Case - ESC/POS builder produces bytes
test_step: Call EscPosBuilder to build simple commands
expected_result: Returns Uint8Array with valid byte count > 0; Contains ESC @ initialization bytes
